text: SUMMARY: Frontend-focused Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of industry experience in developing web and mobile applications. Proven track record of building scalable and user-friendly interfaces using React and React Native, reaching thousands of users. Passionate about delivering digital solutions that solve real-world challenges and improve user experience.

EXPERIENCE S P A Enterprise Services Ltd. Senior Software Engineer | Nov 2025 - Present Vectoscalar Technologies Private Limited Senior Software Engineer | July 2022 - Oct 2025 Software Engineer | Jan 2021 - June 2022

PROJECTS: Infosys - Self Verification | Nov 2025 – Present ● Developed a full-stack self-verification and contractor oversight platform enabling oil & gas workers to conduct protocol-based safety assessments, manage verification workflows, and generate compliance reports with multilingual support (React 19, TypeScript, C#, .Net, Azure MSAL, BP HXD Design System) British Petroleum - Lens | July 2023 – Oct 2025 ● Delivered full-stack development of an automated learning content creation platform using React, TS, C# .Net, mongo, eliminating manual documentation efforts and generating 1200+ training documents for BP's global workforce across web and mobile applications. Pokerbaazi - Pokerboss | March - 2023 – June-2023 ● A mobile application built using React Native , Redux , and Firebase , where users can play poker games and earn rewards. ● Contributed to the initial application setup and developed reusable UI components using React Native and TypeScript , ensuring consistent and efficient UI development. Google - Simsim | April-2022 - February – 2023 A web and mobile app for a social e-commerce platform, with the Front end built using React Native with Redux and react-native-web for cross-platform compatibility. ● Maintained and upgraded the Product Detail Page (PDP) and Video Commerce features. ● Focused on improving site speed metrics and monitoring React Web Vitals. ● Integrated Google Analytics to measure user behavior. ● Managed and upgraded CleverTap for campaigns and notifications. Digitaiken - Hikinjo | May 2022 – March 2023 ● Worked on the application development from scratch, including the initial setup and features like collecting precise user addresses using Google Maps and other geolocation APIs. ● Developed the in-app chat feature using Sendbird and contributed to several other application features. ● Mentored junior developers, providing support and conducting code reviews to ensure high-quality code. BuyStars | October 2021 - April 2022 ● Collaborated on various modules such as stock buy and sell, portfolio management, and user team profiles. ● Developed a notification system that efficiently sends promotions and important updates to millions of users, utilizing MoEngage and Firebase for analytics and engagement. Voyapic | April 2021 – September 2021 ● Took responsibility for features like location tracking and offline mode, and developed various new screens. ● Integrated the camera module to enable users to click pictures within the app. TECHNICAL

SKILLS: ● Programming Languages - JavaScript, Typescript ● Frontend - React, React Native, Redux toolkit, MST, Zustand, HTML, CSS, SASS, Material UI, Bootstrap, Reactstrap ● Backend - C# .NET, NodeJS, Azure ● Analytics- Google Analytics, MoEngage ● Build Management- GitHub Actions, CI/CD
EDUCATION: Bachelor of Computer Applications, 2018-2021 | JIMS(IPU), New Delhi
